final:
module ALU_64bit (  
    input [63:0] A,  
    input [63:0] B,  
    input [1:0] control,  
    output reg [63:0] result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (control)  
            2'b00: result = A + B;          // Addition  
            2'b01: result = A - B;          // Subtraction  
            2'b10: result = A & B;          // Bitwise AND  
            default: result = 64'b0;         // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result = ~A; result = ~B; result = ~(A + B); result = ~(A - B); result = ~(A & B);
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: result = ~A; result = ~B; result = ~(A + B); result = ~(A - B); result = ~(A & B);
